mapper.select: SELECT acc.sfid as accsfid, acc.appcompanyid as appcompanyid, acc.appcompany as appCompany, acc.affiliationstorenamealphabetic as affiliationStoreNameAlphabetic, acc.affiliationstorenamekana, acc.affiliationstorenamekanji, acc.website, acc.keiri_no as keirino, acc.corporate_number as corporatenumber, acc.mertermno, acc.iris_id as irisid, concat('', acc.merchantinfo_isrepresentative) as merchantinfoisrepresentative, acc.merchantinfo_inquiryname as merchantinfoinquiryname, acc.merchantinfo_inquiryphone as merchantinfoinquiryphone, acc.merchantinfo_warningemail as merchantinfowarningemail, acc.merchantinfo_inquiryemail as merchantinfoinquiryemail, acc.merchantinfo_errorinquiryname as merchantinfoerrorinquiryname, acc.merchantinfo_errorinquiryphone as merchantinfoerrorinquiryphone, acc.merchantinfo_errorinquiryemail merchantinfoerrorinquiryemail, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountbank as merchantinfoerroraccountbank, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountbranch as merchantinfoerroraccountbranch, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccounttype as merchantinfoerroraccounttype, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountnumber as merchantinfoerroraccountnumber, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountname as merchantinfoerroraccountname, acc.merchantinfo_erroraccountkana as merchantinfoerroraccountkana, acc.merchantinfo_serviceid as merchantinfoserviceid, acc.merchantinfo_paymentcontactname as merchantinfopaymentcontactname, acc.merchantinfo_remarks as merchantinforemarks, acc.merchantinfo_radename as merchantinforadename, acc.merchantinfo_postalcode as merchantinfopostalcode, acc.merchantinfo_prefecturecode as merchantinfoprefecturecode, acc.merchantinfo_address as merchantinfoaddress, acc.merchantinfo_addresskana as merchantinfoaddresskana, acc.merchantinfo_phonenumberhyphen as merchantinfophonenumberhyphen, acc.merchantinfo_contactname as merchantinfocontactname, acc.merchantinfo_contactemail as merchantinfocontactemail, acc.merchantcontrinfor_applicationcars as merchantcontrinforapplicationcars, acc.merchantcontrinfor_tabletmodel as merchantcontrinfortabletmodel, COALESCE(to_char(acc.merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS merchantcontrinforapplicationdate, COALESCE(to_char(merchantcontrinfor_applicationdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS merchantcontrinforapplicationdate, acc.merchantcontrinfor_isfacetofacesettlement as merchantcontrinforisfacetofacesettlement, acc.merchantcontrinfor_isregistry as merchantcontrinforisregistry, acc.merchantcontrinfor_licensename as merchantcontrinforlicensename, acc.merchantcontrinfor_licensenumber as merchantcontrinforlicensenumber, COALESCE(to_char(merchantcontrinfor_licenseacquisitiondate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantcontrinforlicenseacquisitiondate, acc.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekanji as merchantreprinforfullnamekanji, acc.merchantreprinfor_fullnamekana as merchantreprinforfullnamekana, acc.merchantreprinfor_postalcode as merchantreprinforpostalcode, acc.merchantreprinfor_prefecturecode as merchantreprinforprefecturecode, acc.merchantreprinfor_address as merchantreprinforaddress, acc.merchantreprinfor_phone as merchantreprinforphone, COALESCE(to_char(merchantreprinfor_birthday, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantreprinforbirthday, acc.merchantreprinfor_sex as merchantreprinforsex, acc.merchantreprinfor_memo as merchantreprinformemo, acc.merchantstoreinfor_storenamekanji as merchantstoreinforstorenamekanji, acc.merchantstoreinfor_storenamehalfwidthkana as merchantstoreinforstorenamehalfwidthkana, acc.merchantstoreinfor_storenamealphabet as merchantstoreinforstorenamealphabet, acc.merchantstoreinfor_postalcode as merchantstoreinforpostalcode, acc.merchantstoreinfor_prefecturecode as merchantstoreinforprefecturecode, acc.merchantstoreinfor_address as merchantstoreinforaddress, acc.merchantstoreinfor_addresskana as merchantstoreinforaddresskana, acc.merchantstoreinfor_phone as merchantstoreinforphone, acc.merchantstoreinfor_memo as merchantstoreinformemo, acc.merchantinfo_meterlist as merchantInfoMeterList, COALESCE(to_char(acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_date, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), '') AS merchantdeliveryinfordate, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_gakkencustomernumber as merchantdeliveryinforgakkencustomernumber, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_name as merchantdeliveryinforname, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_postalcode as merchantdeliveryinforpostalcode, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_prefecturecode as merchantdeliveryinforprefecturecode, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_address as merchantdeliveryinforaddress, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_contactname as merchantdeliveryinforcontactname, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_phone as merchantdeliveryinforphone, acc.merchantdeliveryinfor_memo as merchantdeliveryinformemo, acc.merchantpayinfo_name as merchantpayinfoname, acc.merchantpayinfo_postalcode as merchantpayinfopostalcode, CONCAT(acc.merchantpayinfo_address1,acc.merchantpayinfo_address2) as companiesmerchantpayinfoaddress, acc.merchantpayinfo_address1 as merchantpayinfoaddress1, acc.merchantpayinfo_address2 as merchantpayinfoaddress2, acc.merchantpayinfo_contactname as merchantpayinfocontactname, COALESCE(to_char(merchantoperinfor_startdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantoperinforstartdate, COALESCE(to_char(merchantoperinfor_acceptancedate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantoperinforacceptancedate, COALESCE(to_char(merchantoperinfor_guaranteeenddate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantoperinforguaranteeenddate, COALESCE(to_char(merchantoperinfor_contractenddate, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), '') AS merchantoperinforcontractenddate, acc.merchantoperinfor_memo as merchantoperinformemo, bmNetBankAccount.bankname as netbankname, bmNetBankAccount.banknamekana as netpaymerchantsbanknamekana, bmNetBankAccount.branchnamekana as netpayMerchantsBranchNameKana, netBankAccount.accountNameKana as netpayMerchantsAccountNameKana, bmNetBankAccount.bankcode as netpayMerchantsBankCode, bmNetBankAccount.branchcode as netpayMerchantsBranchCode, netBankAccount.accountnumber as netpayMerchantsAccountNumber, netBankAccount.accountnamekana as netpayMerchantsAccountNameKana, netBankAccount.accounttype as netpayMerchantsAccountType, bmItabBankAccount.bankname as itab, bmItabBankAccount.branchnamekana as itabbranchnamekana, itabBankAccount.accountname as itabaccountname, bmItabBankAccount.banknamekana as itabbanknamekana, bmItabBankAccount.bankcode as itabbankcode, bmItabBankAccount.branchcode as itabbranchcode, itabBankAccount.accountnumber as itabaccountnumber, itabBankAccount.accountnamekana as itabaccountnamekana, itabBankAccount.accounttype as itabaccounttype, payment.linepaychannelid, payment.linepaychannelsecret, payment.aupaystoreid, payment.serviceid, payment.tofacemerchantid, payment.nonToFaceMerchantId, payment.toFaceHashKey, payment.nonToFaceHashKey, payment.toFaceEncryptKey as toFaceEncryptKey, payment.NonToFaceEncryptKey as nonToFaceEncryptKey, payment.toFaceEncryptIv, payment.NonToFaceEncryptIV as nonToFaceEncryptIv, payment.toFaceBasicAuthId, payment.nonToFaceBasicAuthId, payment.toFaceBasicAuthPassword, payment.nonToFaceBasicAuthPassword, payment.toFaceCardType, payment.NonToFaceCardType as nonToFaceCardType, payment.toFacePaymentRouteId, payment.nonToFacePaymentRouteId FROM accountsync acc LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync netBankAccount ON acc.sfid = netBankAccount.account AND netBankAccount.accountcategory = 'ネット決済支払' LEFT JOIN bankaccountinformationsync itabBankAccount ON acc.sfid = itabBankAccount.account AND itabBankAccount.accountcategory = 'ITAB決済支払' LEFT JOIN bankmaster bmNetBankAccount ON netBankAccount.accountbank = bmNetBankAccount.sfid LEFT JOIN bankmaster bmItabBankAccount ON itabBankAccount.accountbank = bmItabBankAccount.sfid LEFT JOIN paymentsystemlinkinforsync payment ON acc.sfid = payment.internetpaymerstore WHERE acc.appcompany=#{sfid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY acc.sfid LIMIT 10000
